suite.name: suite S1779456233379 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Login With Valid Credentials
test.doc: User connects to saucedemo.com with valid username and password and is redirected to home page with product list
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

test.name: TC_002 Add Product To Cart
test.doc: User selects a product from the list and clicks Add to cart button - product is added and cart badge shows correct count
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

test.name: TC_003 Complete Checkout Process
test.doc: User accesses cart, enters delivery and payment information, validates order and receives confirmation message
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

test.name: TC_004 Logout From Application
test.doc: User clicks burger menu and selects logout option and is redirected to login page unable to access protected pages
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

suite.status: Suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.
